data.title: Steel Dynamics set to report Q3 earnings of $2.63/share, revenue around $4.76B. Investors eye $500/month dividends.
data.description: Steel Dynamics, Inc. will be reporting its third-quarter earnings on Monday, Oct. 20th after the market closes. Analysts predict earnings to be around $2.63 per share, up from $2.05 per share in the same period last year. The expected quarterly revenue is $4.76 billion, compared to $4.34 billion in the previous year. The company's current annual dividend yield is 1.40%, with a quarterly dividend payout of 50 cents per share ($2.00 annually). Investors are considering potential gains from dividends. To generate $500 monthly from Steel Dynamics, one would aim for a yearly total of $6,000 ($500 x 12 months). More details can be found on the full story at Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chery Super Hybrid Global Endurance Test ends successfully in Wuhu, China after covering 1403km across three provinces.
data.description: In Wuhu, China on October 16, 2025, the "Endless Horizon Worry-Free Voyage" Chery Super Hybrid (CSH) Global Endurance Test successfully finished. This test covered a total distance of 1403 kilometers across three provinces - Shanxi, Henan, and Anhui. The motorcade included TIGGO7 CSH, TIGGO8 CSH, and TIGGO9 CSH models, demonstrating the robustness of CSH technology and its ability to provide stability and comfort on various road types.

data.title: Home Trends & Design partners with FurnitureDealer.net for eco-friendly furniture collections, elevating access to online platform.
data.description: A recent collaboration between Home Trends & Design and FurnitureDealer.net is bringing eco-friendly furniture collections to a wider audience. The strategic alliance, announced on October 17, 2025, combines the strengths of both companies to provide customers with a broader selection of sustainable furniture options. This partnership aims to improve access to environmentally friendly products and promote responsible consumer choices. Based in Austin, Texas, Home Trends & Design is known for its stylish and eco-conscious furniture designs. FurnitureDealer.net, a leading online furniture platform, will now offer a curated selection of these eco-friendly collections to its customers. This collaboration is expected to increase the availability of sustainable furniture choices and contribute to the growing trend of environmentally conscious living. The partnership will benefit customers by offering them more options to furnish their homes in an environmentally friendly manner.

data.title: Bybit releases quarterly report on rise of Perp DEXs, world's second-largest crypto exchange, highlights surge in adoption of Decentralized perpetual exchanges.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE, on October 17, 2025, Bybit, the globe's second-largest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, has revealed its most recent Bybit x Block Scholes Crypto Derivatives Analytics Report. The highlight of the report includes a significant increase in adoption of decentralized perpetual exchanges, known as perp DEXs.

data.title: VENU launches "Artist 280" travel services, providing private air access to music industry stars with FAA-certified operator.
data.description: In Colorado Springs, Venu Holding Corporation has introduced its "Artist 280" travel services, targeted at musicians and bands. Operating under the NYSE American symbol VENU, the company is known for disrupting the live entertainment and hospitality sectors. The recent announcement revealed VENU's partnership with an FAA-certified air charter provider, enabling the company to offer exclusive private air and travel options. This service is specifically tailored for top performers in the music industry set to showcase their talents at VENU's renowned venues.

data.title: 29% of U.S. home purchases are made in cash, slightly down from previous year's 29%.
data.description: In August, approximately 28.8% of U.S. homebuyers purchased their homes with all cash, a slight decrease from the previous year's 29%. This data comes from a recent report by Redfin, a real estate brokerage company partnered with Rocket. The highest rate of all-cash transactions was recorded at nearly 35% during late 2023 and early 2024 when mortgage rates were at a peak in the high-7% range. Many buyers opted for cash payments to steer clear of elevated monthly interest charges.

data.title: Kate Hudson collaborates with CAFÉ™ for a stylish kitchen remodel, inspired by her mother's kitchen.
data.description: In Louisville, Kentucky, CAFÉ™, known for its customizable hardware for kitchen design, collaborated with actress Kate Hudson to renovate her childhood home. The project aimed to mirror Hudson's distinctive style, needs, and sentimental attachments. Influenced by her mother's cherished blue-and-white kitchen, Hudson embarked on the renovation with a blend of nostalgia and contemporary sophistication. She was particularly impressed by CAFÉ's assortment of customizable options.

data.title: Agios' PYRUKYND® approved by CHMP for anemia in adults with thalassemia, enhancing treatment options.
data.description: Today, Agios revealed that the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) has provided a favorable opinion for the new indication of PYRUKYND in adult patients with anemia linked to thalassemia.

data.title: Oklo and newcleo partner with Blykalla for US nuclear fuel development; newcleo to invest $2 billion.
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Oklo Inc. (NYSE: OKLO), an advanced nuclear technology company, and newcleo, a European developer of advanced nuclear reactors, have revealed a partnership to build advanced fuel fabrication and manufacturing infrastructure in the US. The agreement, contingent on standard approvals, will see newcleo investing up to $2 billion through a newcleo-affiliated investment entity. Additionally, Blykalla, an advanced nuclear technology developer in Sweden, is contemplating collaboration.

data.title: Shiba Inu drops 7% to $0.000009687, down 26% monthly. Charts suggest a possible 30% decline ahead unless bulls rebound.
data.description: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) has seen a 7% drop on Friday, trading at $0.000009687, indicating a monthly decline of over 26%. Analysis suggests a potential further 30% decrease if bulls do not rally soon. Shiba Inu has breached the critical support zone of $0.0000098–$0.0000100, leading to increased downward pressure. The daily chart reflects a significant break below the long-standing floor, with technical indicators pointing towards a bearish scenario unless there is a swift recovery. For more information, refer to a detailed report on the situation.
